items.docs:
Retrieve amendments of a contract
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`, `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the employee contract.

items.docs:
Amend the details of a contract. Please note that if the contract is already signed or active, then the update will have to be approved and re-signed for to take effect.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

items.docs:
Attach a file to contract document.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale to use for the invite link.

items.docs:
Generates and returns a signed invitation URL that allows a worker to review and sign their contract securely. Use this endpoint to initiate or resend the contract signing process after the contract has been created. Requires the contract_id, which is provided during the initial Create Contract workflow.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

params.name: templateId
params.description: ID of an existing contract template.

items.docs:
Retrieve an IC and EOR contract agreement content in HTML. If no template is specified, the default or currently assigned template will be used. This endpoint does not support Global Payroll contract type.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`, `worker:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

items.docs:
Invite a worker to sign the contract. Worker will be notified via email
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

items.docs:
Remove invite in order to re-invite a worker to sign the contract
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The Deel contract ID for which payment dates are being retrieved.

items.docs:
Fetches a list of payment dates associated with a specific contract. This endpoint provides information on when contractors are scheduled to be paid, along with the current status of each payment cycle.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

items.docs:
Sign a contract as a client.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the contract.

params.name: expand
params.description: Include cost centers in the response.

items.docs:
Retrieve a single contract.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

items.docs:
Add an external Id to a Deel contract. You can use this to add a Deel contract's refernece Id in your platform. External Id can be passed as a query parameter in List contract endpoint to find this contract later.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: after_cursor
params.description: Return next page of results after the given cursor.

params.name: limit
params.description: Return a page of results with the given number of records.

params.name: order_direction
params.description: Order direction of results; ascending or descending.

params.name: types
params.description: Filter contracts by type. A contract is included in the results if its type is in this list.

params.name: statuses
params.description: Filter contracts by current status. A contract is included in the results if its status is in this list.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Filter contracts for the given team ID. NOTE: All query parameters are technically strings or arrays of strings.

params.name: external_id
params.description: Filter contracts for the given external ID.

params.name: external_id_absent
params.description: Filter contracts by external ID presence. When true, returns contracts without an external ID. When false, returns contracts with an external ID. Cannot be used with external_id query param when set to true.

params.name: countries
params.description: Filter contracts by country codes.

params.name: currencies
params.description: Filter contracts by currency codes.

params.name: search
params.description: Include a contract if its name or the contractor's name contains the given search term.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort contracts by the given field name.

params.name: expand
params.description: Include cost centers in the response.

params.description: statuses of invoice adjustment to filter

params.name: invoice_id
params.description: ID of an existing invoice

params.name: reporter_id
params.description: ID of an existing profile

params.name: date_from
params.description: To get invoice adjustments submitted on or after given start date (inclusive). Short date in format ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). For example: 2022-12-31.

params.name: date_to
params.description: To get invoice adjustments submitted before given end date (excludes records submitted on this date). Short date in format ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). For example: 2022-12-31.

params.name: limit
params.description: Return a page of results with given number of records; NOTE: technically ALL query parameters are strings or array of strings

params.name: offset
params.description: Return a page of results after given index of row; NOTE: technically ALL query parameters are strings or array of strings

items.docs:
Retrieve invoice adjustments. You can filter the list by providing additional parameters e.g. contract_id, contract_type etc.
 **Token scopes**: `invoice-adjustments:read`

params.name: recurring
params.description: Add this invoice adjustment as recurring

items.docs:
Create an invoice adjustment using this endpoint. For example, you can add a bonus, commission, VAT %, deduction etc. to an invoice.
 **Token scopes**: `invoice-adjustments:write`, `worker:write`

params.name: id
params.description: ID of an existing invoice

items.docs:
Use this endpoint to retrieve the details of a specific invoice adjustment (line item) by its id. Call it when you need to display or audit a charge, deduction, or expense on an invoice, or to reconcile a payment discrepancy. Provide the adjustment id in the path parameter. This operation is read-only.
 **Token scopes**: `invoice-adjustments:read`, `worker:read`

params.name: id
params.description: Invoice adjustment id.

items.docs:
Update an invoice adjustment.
 **Token scopes**: `invoice-adjustments:write`, `worker:write`

params.name: id
params.description: Invoice adjustment id.

items.docs:
Delete an adjustment.
 **Token scopes**: `invoice-adjustments:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Deel contract for which milestones are being retrieved.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of milestones associated with a specific contract. Each milestone includes details such as its title, amount, status, and relevant dates, along with information about the creator and reviewer.
 **Token scopes**: `milestones:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Deel contract where the milestone will be added.

items.docs:
Add a new milestone to a specific contract. Milestones represent distinct deliverables or phases in the contract and can include additional details such as attachments.
 **Token scopes**: `milestones:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

params.name: milestone_id
params.description: ID of milestone to return

items.docs:
Retrieve a single milestone.
 **Token scopes**: `milestones:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Deel contract from which the milestone will be deleted.

params.name: milestone_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the milestone that is to be deleted.

items.docs:
Delete a specific milestone associated with a contract. This operation removes the milestone and its data permanently from the system.
 **Token scopes**: `milestones:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the Deel contract for which to retrieve off-cycle payments.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of off-cycle payments for the specified contract ID. Off-cycle payments are payments made outside the regular payment schedule, often for exceptional or one-time expenses.
 **Token scopes**: `off-cycle-payments:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the Deel contract for which the off-cycle payment is being created.

items.docs:
Add a new invoice line-item for the purpose of an off-cycle payment associated with a specific contract. This is typically used for exceptional payments outside the regular payment schedule.
 **Token scopes**: `off-cycle-payments:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: Deel contract id.

params.name: id
params.description: Deel off-cycle payment id.

items.docs:
Retrieve a single off-cycle payment.
 **Token scopes**: `off-cycle-payments:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the Deel contract.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of tasks associated with a specific contract. Each task contains details such as its ID, amount, submission date, status, and description. This endpoint is useful for tracking the progress and status of tasks related to contracts.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:read`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique Deel contract ID associated with the task.

items.docs:
Create a new task for a contractor associated with a specific Deel contract. A task can include details like amount, description, submission date.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Deel contract.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the task to be deleted.

params.name: reason
params.description: The reason for deleting the task. This can be used for auditing purposes.

items.docs:
Delete a specific task associated with the contract. Optionally, a reason can be provided for auditing or documentation purposes.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: contract_id
params.description: The unique Deel contract ID associated with the task.

params.name: task_id
params.description: The unique ID of the task to be reviewed.

items.docs:
Review a specific task associated with a Deel contract to approve or decline the submitted work. The review includes the status (approved or declined) and an optional reason if declined.
 **Token scopes**: `contracts:write`

params.name: date_from
params.description: Filtered results will include records created on or after the provided date. Short date in format ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). For example: 2022-12-31.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of timesheets found for a contract.
 **Token scopes**: `timesheets:read`

params.name: id
params.description: ID of an existing timesheet

items.docs:
Retrieve a single timesheet entry by Id.
 **Token scopes**: `timesheets:read`

params.name: id
params.description: ID of an existing timesheet.

items.docs:
Use this endpoint to update an existing timesheet entry by its id when correcting logged hours or refining the work note. Send a PATCH request to /timesheets/:id with a data object containing fields to change, such as quantity, description, or hourly_report_preset_id. Both clients and contractors can perform this update.
 **Token scopes**: `timesheets:write`

params.name: id
params.description: ID of an existing timesheet

items.docs:
Review a timesheet to approve or decline submitted work.
 **Token scopes**: `timesheets:write`
